name: Bean To Me!
short_description: Use strange and magical beans to bend the rules and chain together absurd synergies in a wild twist on the ancient game of Mancala. Battle your friends, collect new beans, and build the ultimate bean loadout!
detailed_description:
Bean To Me!
Use strange and magical beans to bend the rules and chain together absurd synergies in a wild twist on the ancient game of Mancala!
Battle friends and foes alike in the ultimate test of bean-pushing strategy! Gather beans, strike multiple times with Bonus turns, and Steal massive piles of beans when your opponent is distracted!

Collect Weird Beans


Create the perfect arsenal of bizarre beans, each with their own powers. But be careful; anything you bring into a match could end up on the other side of the board and used against you! Unlock them by completing special challenges, and by cracking open a refreshing can of beans every few matches!

Battle Your Friends


Battle your best buds with your best beans - challenge them head-to-head bean battles in both online and local multiplayer!

Master The Strategy


Dig down into one of the world's oldest mind games, and discover the rich strategies within; do you hold off on scoring big on your turn to increase the potential synergies of your beans? Or do you bait your opponent into Stealing a particularly troublesome Bomb Bean?
